submenu.label: PromptPack
config.includeFullTree: Always include the full project tree structure.
config.customExcludes: Deprecated: Use userExcludes instead. Additional glob patterns to exclude.
config.excludeFolders: Folder name patterns to exclude from bundling. Supports glob suffixes/prefixes (e.g. *_venv, .cache). Matched folders are never scanned.
config.userExcludes: Additional glob patterns to exclude. Applied on top of folder and binary excludes. .gitignore files are merged automatically.
config.includeDocsFromGitignore: Include `docs/` folder in bundle even if it is listed in `.gitignore`. Useful for AI documentation bundles.
config.useBundlerignore: Enable `.bundlerignore` file support. This file works like `.gitignore` but only for PromptPack.
config.transformJsonFiles: Transform JSON files to AI-friendly YAML-like format. Saves 60-90% tokens on package-lock.json, tsconfig.json, etc.
config.extractDatabaseSchema: Extract database schema from SQLite files and SQL migrations. Outputs SQL + Mermaid ER diagram for AI context.
config.tokenWarningThresholds: Show warning when bundle exceeds these token thresholds. Set to empty array [] to disable warnings.
config.suppressEditorTab: Don't open bundle in editor tab. Bundle is still copied to clipboard. Enable for clipboard-only workflow.
config.useDependencyOrdering: Sort files by dependency order (entry points first, then dependencies). EA-04 feature.
config.binaryExtensions: File extensions to treat as binary. These files appear in the tree but their content is never read.
config.autoSave: Auto-save bundles to docs/bundles/ folder with timestamp.
config.includeFileDate: Include last modified date for each file in bundle (disable to save tokens).
config.dateFormat: Date format. Use: DD, MM, YYYY.
config.timeFormat: Time format. Use: HH/hh, mm, ss.
